payload.answer: All memory_cards entries have been deleted. Current memory_cards: none.

entity_resolution.reason: SQL DELETE FROM memory_cards; targets all records in memory_cards table; no specific IDs provided; operation will remove all entries

repair_options: If this was unintended, consider restoring from a recent backup if available.
